title: tzvelevopyrethrum khorassanicum
intro: Tzvelevopyrethrum khorassanicum is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a type of pyrethrum. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of pyrethrins, compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Tzvelevopyrethrum khorassanicum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and swelling, and treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant, including extracts and tinctures, are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
